title: Transnovel
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Transnovels''' were written by the [[Snivvian/Legends|Snivvians]] of [[Cadomai Prime/Legends|Cadomai Prime]] and were renowned throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Guide">''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''</ref> During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], they were monitored by the [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] [[Coalition for Progress/Legends|Coalition for Progress]]' [[Art (COMPNOR)/Legends|Art]] group.<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-10-XX -->''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->''[[Death Star Technical Companion]]''
*<!-- 1993-XX-XX -->[[Death Star Technical Companion (Second Edition)|''Death Star Technical Companion'', Second Edition]]
*<!-- 1994-07-XX -->[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]
*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''
